release.deck: This dev build cuts RSS retry churn and keeps installed dev builds on the dev channel.
fixes: RSS scheduled polling now backs off after runtime deferrals instead of retrying every 15 seconds.
Broken RSS feeds now record retry windows after failed fetches, preventing dead sources from being retried on every scheduled pass.
Installed dev builds continue using the dev release channel after reinstall.
Facebook sync keeps the prior zero-post diagnostics so unusable scrape results are surfaced as sync issues instead of healthy empty runs.
Recycles idle Automerge sync workers after queued document work finishes.
Raises adaptive memory guardrails on high-memory systems so long-running provider sync has more headroom.
Recovers social sync controls cleanly after memory-pressure deferrals.
Aligns the social memory preflight e2e with transient provider-health memory pressure.
Keeps the Phase 7 docs and public roadmap aligned with the new social scrape memory behavior.
followUps: Install this build and verify RSS failures stop piling up in sync health.
Run the next Facebook sync soak after explicit provider-risk confirmation, using the new diagnostics if results are still zero.

releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.5.3112-dev

This dev build cuts RSS retry churn and keeps installed dev builds on the dev channel

### Fixes

- RSS scheduled polling now backs off after runtime deferrals instead of retrying every 15 seconds
- Broken RSS feeds now record retry windows after failed fetches, preventing dead sources from being retried on every scheduled pass
- Installed dev builds continue using the dev release channel after reinstall
- Facebook sync keeps the prior zero-post diagnostics so unusable scrape results are surfaced as sync issues instead of healthy empty runs
- Capture and scraper reliability fixes
- Reader, feed, and header polish
- Release build and type-safety cleanup
- Recycles idle Automerge sync workers after queued document work finishes
- Raises adaptive memory guardrails on high-memory systems so long-running provider sync has more headroom
- Recovers social sync controls cleanly after memory-pressure deferrals
- Aligns the social memory preflight e2e with transient provider-health memory pressure
- Keeps the Phase 7 docs and public roadmap aligned with the new social scrape memory behavior

### Follow-ups

- Install this build and verify RSS failures stop piling up in sync health
- Run the next Facebook sync soak after explicit provider-risk confirmation, using the new diagnostics if results are still zero

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
